caption: The video features Jeff Kelly, a Senior Analyst at Wikibon, speaking at the Big Data SV 2015 event. He is dressed in a formal gray suit with a white shirt and a patterned tie, indicating a professional setting. The background prominently displays the event's hashtag, #BigDataSV, along with the year 2015. Jeff appears to be engaged in a discussion or presentation, gesturing with his hands as he speaks, which suggests he is explaining or emphasizing a point related to big data analytics. The lower third of the screen includes his name, Twitter handle (@jeffreyfkelly), and title, providing additional context for the audience. The overall atmosphere conveys a structured and informative session aimed at professionals interested in big data technology.
